name: Telomerase Restoration Coverage Repair for June 10, 2026
summary: Coverage-repair bundle adding TA-65 review synthesis, registry watchlist completeness, disease-context AAV-hTERT boundaries, and TERT mRNA boundary context while keeping Telomerase Restoration at human_biomarker_signal with mixed momentum and a tentative read.

scope.question: Which known source-completeness gaps for Telomerase Restoration need repair, and does resolving them change the coverage verdict or public boundaries?

proposed_changes.summary: Add the 2025 TA-65 systematic review and meta-analysis source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The prior coverage assessment named this review as the highest-priority recent-review gap.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the TA-65 systematic review and meta-analysis study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record captures the review scope, trial count, participant count, endpoints, and TA-65 intervention mapping.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the TA-65 review-level limiting finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: The finding preserves the key interpretation: telomere-length movement does not yet translate into frailty or inflammation improvement.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the TERT mRNA radiation-injury source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The prior coverage assessment named telomerase mRNA as boundary context that should be represented rather than silently omitted.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the TERT mRNA human skin experimental study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study belongs as telomerase-therapy and DNA-damage boundary context, not as broad aging evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the TERT mRNA boundary finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: The finding captures the positive radiation-injury biology while preserving the no-telomere-extension and non-aging limitations.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the TA-65MD healthy-volunteer registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The registry is part of the missing TA-65 watchlist and had no posted results in the current API view.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the TA-65MD healthy-volunteer registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record gives future surveillance concrete status, population, endpoint, and no-results metadata.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the no-results finding for the TA-65MD healthy-volunteer registry.
proposed_changes.rationale: The finding keeps a large but stale registry visible without treating it as efficacy evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the terminated TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The registry is part of the missing TA-65 watchlist and is limiting clinical context.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the terminated TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record captures termination, enrollment, endpoint, and no-results metadata.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the no-results finding for the terminated TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry.
proposed_changes.rationale: The finding preserves termination as limiting context without overstating what the registry shows.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the completed TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The registry is part of the missing TA-65 watchlist and had no posted results in the current API view.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the completed TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record preserves completed status and no-results metadata for future surveillance.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the no-results finding for the completed TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry.
proposed_changes.rationale: The finding distinguishes completed registry status from available outcome evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the cycloastragenol retinal amyloid registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The registry appeared in the watchlist gap and should be represented as telomerase-activator disease-boundary context.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the cycloastragenol retinal amyloid registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record keeps the cycloastragenol and Alzheimer disease scope explicit.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the no-results finding for the cycloastragenol retinal amyloid registry.
proposed_changes.rationale: The finding prevents this completed disease-boundary registry from being mistaken for TA-65 or broad aging evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the planned TA-65 microvascular dysfunction registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The registry is the most current TA-65 watchlist item and had no posted results in the current API view.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the TA-65 microvascular dysfunction registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record captures planned status, estimated timing, vascular-function endpoint, and no-results metadata.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the no-results finding for the planned TA-65 microvascular registry.
proposed_changes.rationale: The finding keeps future vascular-function evidence on watch without treating planned status as current evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Libella AAV-hTERT critical limb ischemia registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The disease-context AAV-hTERT registry repairs the gene-therapy boundary map.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Libella AAV-hTERT critical limb ischemia registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record preserves disease scope, tiny enrollment, unknown status, and no-results metadata.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the no-results finding for the Libella critical limb ischemia registry.
proposed_changes.rationale: The finding keeps disease-context AAV-hTERT activity visible while preventing it from supporting broad aging claims.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Libella AAV-hTERT Alzheimer disease registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: The disease-context AAV-hTERT registry repairs the gene-therapy boundary map.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Libella AAV-hTERT Alzheimer disease registry study.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record preserves disease scope, tiny enrollment, unknown status, and no-results metadata.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the no-results finding for the Libella Alzheimer disease registry.
proposed_changes.rationale: The finding keeps disease-context AAV-hTERT activity visible while preventing it from supporting broad aging claims.

proposed_changes.summary: Refresh the Telomerase Restoration outlook with repaired review, registry, and boundary context.
proposed_changes.rationale: The outlook should reflect the new TA-65 synthesis and concrete no-results registry watchlist while keeping stage, momentum, and read firmness unchanged.

proposed_outlook_implications.note: Repair TA-65 review and registry coverage, add AAV-hTERT and TERT mRNA boundaries, and preserve human_biomarker_signal, mixed momentum, and a tentative read.

next_actions: Publication complete. Review downstream pages if this change affects shared surfaces.
